---
title: "Marketing Projects"
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

.projects-header {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2a4a;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #1a56db;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.projects-subtext {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  color: #555;
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.project-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
}

.project-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.project-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(26,86,219,0.15);
}

.card-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.badge-pdf  { background: #fff0f0; color: #c0392b; }
.badge-pptx { background: #fff4e6; color: #d35400; }
.badge-gdoc { background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; }

.card-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2a4a 0%, #1a56db 100%);
  padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 1.2rem;
  color: white;
}

.card-icon {
  font-size: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.card-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #ffffff;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.card-body {
  padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
  flex-grow: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.card-description {
  color: #4a5568;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.card-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.tag {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  background: #eef2ff;
  color: #3b4fd8;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.card-link {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  background: #1a56db;
  color: white !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.card-link:hover {
  background: #1a2a4a;
}
</style>

<p class="projects-header">📂 Marketing Projects</p>
<p class="projects-subtext">A collection of academic and professional marketing work covering strategy, brand analysis, and presentations.</p>

<div class="project-grid">

  <!-- Card 1 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">🍎</div>
      <p class="card-title">Strategic Business Analysis on Apple</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-pdf">📄 PDF</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        A comprehensive strategic business analysis of Apple Inc., examining market positioning, competitive advantage, and long-term growth strategy.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Brand Strategy</span>
        <span class="tag">Competitive Analysis</span>
        <span class="tag">Apple Inc.</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="marketing-projects/Apple%20final%20presentation.pdf" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 2 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">📰</div>
      <p class="card-title">Current Events Marketing Presentation</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-pptx">📊 PowerPoint</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        A presentation analyzing current marketing trends and real-world business events, connecting classroom concepts to industry developments.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Current Events</span>
        <span class="tag">Market Trends</span>
        <span class="tag">IBM 3072</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="marketing-projects/Current%20Event%20IBM%203072%20Geovanni%20Flores%20(2).pptx" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 3 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">📋</div>
      <p class="card-title">MHR3010 – Final Management Report on Apple Inc.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-pdf">📄 PDF</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        A formal management report produced for MHR3010 covering foundational marketing principles including consumer behavior, segmentation, and promotional strategy as applied to Apple Inc.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Consumer Behavior</span>
        <span class="tag">Segmentation</span>
        <span class="tag">MHR3010</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="marketing-projects/MHR3010%20Final%20Management%20Report_%20Apple%20Inc..pdf" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 4 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">🏢</div>
      <p class="card-title">IBM Project – Target Market Plan (Part 1)</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-gdoc">📝 Google Doc</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        Part 1 of a Target Market Plan developed for Cal Poly Pomona's College of Business Administration, identifying and analyzing IBM's core customer segments and strategic market opportunities.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Target Market</span>
        <span class="tag">IBM</span>
        <span class="tag">Cal Poly Pomona</span>
        <span class="tag">Market Segmentation</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XfmyHbIl8Hvv3JRGkzT-X6dfN59V92R6sTlaDC3rzRw/edit?usp=sharing" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 5 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">🏢</div>
      <p class="card-title">IBM Project – Target Market Plan (Part 2)</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-gdoc">📝 Google Doc</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        Part 2 of the IBM Target Market Plan, expanding on customer segmentation with deeper analysis of positioning strategy, competitive landscape, and go-to-market recommendations.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Target Market</span>
        <span class="tag">IBM</span>
        <span class="tag">Cal Poly Pomona</span>
        <span class="tag">Go-To-Market</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hORK7FN2hPXLNzJGvbJYNsHUcxbDhc7DsCfXS6pnqeY/edit?usp=sharing" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card 6 -->
  <div class="project-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">🏈</div>
      <p class="card-title">NFL – National Football League Marketing Analysis</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <span class="card-badge badge-pptx">📊 PowerPoint</span>
      <p class="card-description">
        A marketing analysis and presentation on the National Football League, exploring brand strategy, fan engagement, sponsorship, and the NFL's broader marketing ecosystem.
      </p>
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">NFL</span>
        <span class="tag">Sports Marketing</span>
        <span class="tag">Brand Analysis</span>
        <span class="tag">Fan Engagement</span>
      </div>
      <a class="card-link" href="marketing-projects/NFL-Presenation-GeovanniF.pptx" target="_blank">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
